subject: Fw: Important: Cell Phone Numbers Go Public Tomorrow
body:
----- Original Message -----
From: Carole Radziwill <radziwill@aol.com>
To: Gmax
Sent: Wed Jun 04 13:04:27 2008
Subject: Re: Important: Cell Phone Numbers Go Public Tomorrow

Its not a hoax. I read al that. blahblah.....The point is a 411 wireless directory is being released that telemarketers do not have access to right now. But eventually telemarketer lobbyists will have legislation passed that allows them access to wireless numbers, or they will find some loophole just like they did with landlines.....So at least register as an unlisted number and get a couple more years of privacy before the government and business knows everything you do, say and buy......ugh.

On Jun 4, 2008, at 12:54 PM, Gmax wrote:


	I think it's a hoax..check this link out..
	
	http://www.tulsaworld.com/news/article.aspx?articleID=071016_1_A11_spanc74848
	
	----- Original Message -----
	From: radziwill@aol.com <radziwill@aol.com>
	To: Carole Radziwill <radziwill@aol.com>
	Cc: Caryn Zucker <carynzucker@mac.com>; Andy Cohen <Andrew.Cohen@nbcuni.com>; Andy Karash <longfellow@mindspring.com>; Sean Avery <savery16@tmo.blackberry.net>; Rory Kennedy <rkennedy@moxiefirecracker.com>; Mark Bailey <mdbails@gmail.com>; Liz Smith <MES3838@aol.com>; Damon Dash <ddash@att.blackberry.net>; Cope <copemusic@tmail.com>; Karin Catt <karin@catt.com.au>; john.rosasco@thegarden.com <john.rosasco@thegarden.com>; Naeem Khan <Nk32@mac.com>; Kelly Framel <kelly@naeemkhan.com>; Stan Rosenfield <stan@sra-pr.net>
	Sent: Wed Jun 04 11:51:13 2008
	Subject: Important: Cell Phone Numbers Go Public Tomorrow
	
	Fyi.....
	-----Original Message-----
	From: "Donna D'Cruz" <donnadcruz@rasamusic.com>
	
	Date: Wed, 4 Jun 2008 11:24:50
	To:"'Info'" <info@rasamusic.com>
	Subject: VITAL INFO:Cell Phone Numbers Go Public Tomorrow
	
	
	Cell Phone Numbers Go Public Tomorrow
	 In case you have not done this yet.
	 Cell phone numbers go public tomorrow.
	 REMINDER....all cell phone numbers are being released to telemarketing
	 companies tomorrow and you will start to receive sale calls.....
	YOU  WILL BE CHARGED FOR THESE CALLS.
	 To prevent this, call the following number from your cell phone:
	 888-382-1222
	> It is the National DO NOT CALL list. It will only take a minute of
	> your time. It blocks your number for five (5) years. You must call
	> from the cell phone number you want to have blocked. You cannot call
	> from a different phone number.
	>
	> HELP OTHERS BY PASSING THIS ON TO ALL YOUR FRIENDS. It takes about 20
	> seconds.
	 
	
	"If  you are irritated by every rub,
	how then, will you be polished?"  
	Rumi
	 
	 <outbind://166/Signature2_files/image001.jpg>
	Where Sensuality, Spirituality and Style converge...
	Rasa Music
	120 Fifth Avenue,
	7th Floor
	New York, NY USA 10011
	tel: 212 253 1567
	fax: 212 253 1521
	 
	


I AM PHASING OUT AOL. PLEASE CHANGE MY EMAIL IN YOUR ADDRESS BOOK. THANK YOU.


c@caroleradziwill.com







=

 REMINDER....all cell phone numbers are being released to telemarketing 
 companies tomorrow and you will start to receive sale calls..... 
YOU  WILL BE CHARGED FOR THESE CALLS. 
 To prevent this, call the following number from your cell phone: 
 888-382-1222 
> It is the National DO NOT CALL list. It will only take a minute of 
> your time. It blocks your number for five (5) years. You must call 
> from the cell phone number you want to have blocked. You cannot call 
> from a different phone number. 
> 
> HELP OTHERS BY PASSING THIS ON TO ALL YOUR FRIENDS. It takes about 20 
> seconds.
